flavorText: Corsairs are aggressive duelists and boarding predators who live for the first hard impact of a fight.

features.description: Explode into close quarters with a burst of steel, movement, and confidence the moment you commit.
Read one-on-one fights instantly and turn tight melee exchanges into your comfort zone.
Punish cramped fights and any enemy who cannot easily disengage from you.
Your violence sends a message; nearby enemies feel the cost of standing their ground.
Leave behind a terrifying trail of momentum whenever you drop or rout a foe.

corsair-boarding-flurry.summary: Gain a front-loaded boarding burst that rewards closing distance first.
corsair-boarding-flurry.description: This is the subclass opener for players who want the Pirate to feel like an all-in deck fighter. It should create cinematic turns built around leaping in, drawing steel, and immediately putting a target on the back foot.

corsair-duelist-instinct.summary: Become better at isolated duels, challenge pressure, and tight melee reads.

corsair-brutal-boarding.summary: Turn cramped spaces and close-quarters pressure into extra punishment.

corsair-iron-broadcast.summary: Your committed aggression starts affecting more than just the first target.

corsair-red-wake.summary: When you break one enemy, you immediately become a problem for the next.
